question: Can you help me plan a sports viewing party for tonight? I need to track the game schedules, order food and drinks, and send out invitations to my friends.
task_description: The user is planning a sports viewing party, needing assistance with tracking game schedules, ordering food and beverages, and sending invitations to friends.
task_goal: The user successfully plans a viewing party with confirmed game times, food delivery, and guest attendance.
options:
A: Absolutely! Let's plan your sports viewing party for this Saturday. I'll start by tracking the game schedules for your favorite teams, including the Australia National Cricket Team, Sydney Swans (AFL), and major soccer matches. I'll set up notifications 30 minutes before each game so you and your guests stay updated. For food and drinks, I recommend ordering from a moderately priced Thai, Mexican, or Greek restaurant with vegetarian-friendly options and outdoor seating, based on your previous preferences. I can help you place the order for delivery timed to arrive before the games start. Finally, I'll draft casual, emoji-friendly invitations for your friends and send them via your preferred messaging apps, ensuring everyone receives the details and can RSVP easily. If you'd like, I can also create a group chat to keep everyone in the loop. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any details!

I can draft casual invitations for your friends and send them via your preferred messaging apps. If you're open to it, I could also help set up a group chat for easier coordination. Please let me know if you have any special requests or if there's anything I might be missing.
